(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, ADA=COTE. BY STIPULATION OF PARTIES, COURT FINDS
THE EMANCIPATION DATE FOR JUELEAH WILLIAMS TO BE 5/17/99 AND NO CHILD SUPPORT IS OWED AS TO THAT MINOR FROM THAT DATE FORWARD; ARREARS OWED SHALL BE
NOR ERIC JACKSON HAS LIVED WITH; FATHER IS ORDERED TO APPEAR. (WIGHTMAN) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SHARON SHIGIO CSR #12286
